overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character running through a desert canyon environment at night, illuminated by moonlight. The character navigates rocky terrain past abandoned structures, with a UI text overlay appearing mid-clip.

events.description: large full moon rises into view from behind rock formations, illuminating the scene
character turns 180 degrees to face the moon direction, camera orbits around

agents.ego_description: running through desert terrain past abandoned structures, then turning toward the moon

entered.detail: derelict white building or vehicle with rounded edges and metallic surface
tall jagged rock formation forming the canyon boundary
steep rock face with rough texture
large bright moon providing primary illumination

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dark desert canyon at night, passing a derelict white structure on the left. Around the 3-second mark, a large moon rises into view from behind the rocks, casting blue light across the terrain. The character then executes a 180-degree turn, bringing the moon fully into view while the camera orbits to follow the movement.

events.description: UI text 'ABANDONING SEARCH' appears briefly at center screen then disappears

agents.ego_description: continuing to run steadily through open canyon terrain away from the abandoned structures

entered.detail: tall isolated rock pinnacles visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues running deeper into the open canyon as a 'ABANDONING SEARCH' text overlay briefly appears and disappears. The abandoned structure is left behind, and the terrain opens up to reveal distant rock towers on the horizon. The moon shifts to the right side of the frame as the character maintains a steady pace through the desolate landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark desert canyon that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit wasteland. It begins with the character running past a derelict white structure in the shadows, just as a large moon rises from behind the rocks to cast a cool blue light across the terrain. As the character executes a sharp 180-degree turn, the camera orbits to bring the moon fully into view before following the character deeper into the open canyon. The scene then expands to reveal distant rock towers on the horizon while an ABANDONING SEARCH text overlay briefly flickers across the screen. Finally, the moon shifts to the right side of the frame as the character maintains a steady pace through the increasingly desolate landscape.
